title: Offhand Lights
description: Make 1.7.10 dynamic lights available for mod offhand.
body:
This mod enhances compatibility between mods that provide dynamic lights and offhand functionality. You can now hold a torch for illumination in one hand and a pickaxe for mining in the other in Minecraft 1.7.10.

It is compatible with Optifine, [Angelica](https://modrinth.com/mod/angelica), [RPLE](https://modrinth.com/mod/rple), [FalseTweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/falsetweaks), [Battlegear2](https://github.com/Mine-and-blade-admin/Battlegear2), [GTNH's Battlegear2 fork](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/Battlegear2), and [Backhand](https://modrinth.com/mod/backhand).
